ModMetaData.name: Family Relations: Adoption
ModMetaData.author: Rycon
ModMetaData.description:
This RimWorld mod adds adoptive relationships to the game.

Want a more accurate relation designator for the non-bio-parent of your same-sex couple that just had a surrogate baby? Want to officially welcome the orphan child you saved from being chased by 72 waster pirates into your colonists' family?

Well, here you go!
